channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-11523] sanity-sec test_27 defect: test is not functional on single node setup
item.description:
tests]# ONLY=27 sh sanity-sec.sh 
...
== sanity-sec test 27: test fileset in various nodemaps ============================================== 16:54:00 (1539622440)
Exercising fileset for nodemap default
On MGS 192.168.1.11, active = nodemap.active=1
waited 0 seconds for sync
On MGS 192.168.1.11, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=1
waited 0 seconds for sync
On MGS 192.168.1.11, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=1
waited 0 seconds for sync
ldlm.namespaces.lustre-MDT0000-lwp-MDT0000.lru_size=clear
ldlm.namespaces.lustre-MDT0000-lwp-OST0000.lru_size=clear
ldlm.namespaces.lustre-MDT0000-lwp-OST0001.lru_size=clear
ldlm.namespaces.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff88013620f800.lru_size=clear
On MGS 192.168.1.11, default.admin_nodemap = nodemap.default.admin_nodemap=0
waited 0 seconds for sync
On MGS 192.168.1.11, default.trusted_nodemap = nodemap.default.trusted_nodemap=0
waited 0 seconds for sync
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
On lm0111 192.168.1.11, default.fileset = cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
MGS
nodemap.default.fileset=/subdir_default
OTHER - IP: 192.168.1.11
cannot run remote command on 192.168.1.11 with no_dsh
 sanity-sec test_27: @@@@@@ FAIL: mgs and default fileset mismatch, 10 attempts
item.summary: sanity-sec test_27 defect: test is not functional on single node setup

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
